methodology.ai_cpi: Average blended price across frontier + reasoning models (non-free)
methodology.budget_index: Average blended price across efficiency + open source models (non-free)

<svg viewBox="0 0 1100 660" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="aipi-strip-svg" role="img" aria-label="AI pricing by category strip plot for 2026-06">
<title>AI pricing by category - 2026-06</title>
<desc>Strip plot of AI model prices across four categories on a log scale. Each dot is a model. Hover for model name and price.</desc>
<style>.aipi-strip-svg{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;}.aipi-svg-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;fill:#fff;}.aipi-svg-subtitle{font-size:12px;fill:#8899AA;}.aipi-svg-axis{stroke:#1E2A36;stroke-width:1;}.aipi-svg-grid{stroke:#1E2A36;stroke-width:0.5;stroke-dasharray:2,3;}.aipi-svg-axis-label{font-size:11px;fill:#8899AA;}.aipi-svg-anchor{font-size:11px;fill:#CCDDEE;font-weight:500;}.aipi-svg-median{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}.aipi-svg-cat{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;fill:#fff;}.aipi-svg-cat-meta{font-size:11px;fill:#8899AA;}.aipi-svg-legend{font-size:11px;fill:#CCDDEE;}.aipi-svg-watermark{font-size:10px;fill:#5F6D7E;}.aipi-dot{transition:r 0.15s ease, stroke-width 0.15s ease;cursor:default;}.aipi-dot:hover{stroke:#fff;stroke-width:2;}</style>
